raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "Direct Air Capture offers a solution to remove and permanently store atmospheric carbon dioxide (CO2) using low carbon emissions energy.",
    "Direct Air Capture is a necessary tool to meet California's climate and clean air goals.",
    "The Direct Air Capture Hub will boost the local economy in the Central Valley.",
